reasoning: ChargePoint has $225 million in cash and cash equivalents (up $5 million sequentially) as of their fiscal Q4 2025 ended Jan 31, 2025, a $150 million undrawn revolving credit facility, and no debt maturities until 2028. Management also noted significant improvements in cash usage and aims to reach positive adjusted EBITDA in fiscal 2026. Given the strong current liquidity and lack of near-term debt maturity, there is no fundamental catalyst for a Chapter 11 filing before the July 1, 2025 resolution date. A bankruptcy filing within this narrow 2-month window is highly improbable.
